raw:
**SCENE ANALYSIS -** A blue plastic container is on a wooden table. Inside the container, there is an orange fruit and a red fruit. The fruits are spherical and have a smooth surface. The container has a rectangular opening. STRATEGY - First, reach into the container to grasp the orange fruit. Then, transport it to a position above the container's opening. Finally, place the orange fruit back into the container. Failure modes include not grasping the correct fruit or dropping it during transport. AFFORDANCE REASONING - Step 1 reach into the container to access the fruits; Step 2 grasp the orange fruit by its body; Step 3 transport it above the container; Step 4 place it back into the container's opening.

Goal: inside(orange_fruit, blue_container)
Scene: blue_container, orange_fruit, red_fruit, table
Step 1: reach(blue_container)
  affordance_region: the opening of the blue container
  contact: gripper_state(open) [progress]
  spatial: distance(gripper, blue_container, <, 0.03) [completion]
  direction: approach_axis(0, 0, -1) [progress]
  done_when: distance(gripper, blue_container) < 0.03
Step 2: grasp(orange_fruit)
  affordance_region: the body of the orange fruit
  contact: holding(orange_fruit) [completion]
  direction: grasp_axis(0, 0, -1) [progress]
  done_when: holding(orange_fruit)
Step 3: transport(orange_fruit -> blue_container)
  affordance_region: the opening of the blue container
  spatial: above(orange_fruit, blue_container, 0.05) [completion]
  safety: no_drop(orange_fruit)
  done_when: above(orange_fruit, blue_container, 0.05)
Step 4: place(orange_fruit -> blue_container)
  affordance_region: the opening of the blue container
  contact: surface_contact(orange_fruit, blue_container) [completion]; released(orange_fruit) [completion]
  pose: inside(orange_fruit, blue_container) [completion]
  done_when: surface_contact(orange_fruit, blue_container) AND released(orange_fruit)
<END_OF_PLAN>

steps.affordance_region: the opening of the blue container
the body of the orange fruit
the opening of the blue container
the opening of the blue container
